project_management_responsibilities.scope_management: Deliver projects and programs on scope. Define program scope objectives, goals and success criteria. Control scope through change management. Provide weekly reports to stakeholders on scope performance.
project_management_responsibilities.budget_management: Deliver projects and programs on budget. Ensure all project resources and materials are accounted for in the budget. Reconcile actual and commitment costs. Obtain formal sponsor funding approval by creating commercial documentation. Provide weekly reports to stakeholders on budget performance.
project_management_responsibilities.schedule_management: Deliver projects and programs on schedule. Define and document schedules (WBS, Roadmap, Timeline). Monitor progress and find creative solutions to accelerate activities. Provide weekly reports to stakeholders on schedule performance.
project_management_responsibilities.resource_management: Acquire resources for the project. Provide resource plans in the form of a Statement of Work. Identify stakeholders and create stakeholder register. Complete on-boarding and off-boarding of resources.
project_management_responsibilities.risk_issue_management: Define and document issues and risks with impact, mitigation, resolution date and escalation for each item. Provide weekly reports to stakeholders on risks and issues. Create and maintain Risk, Issues and Decision logs.
project_management_responsibilities.communication_management: Define and document Communication and stakeholder management plans. Provide timely and targeted reports to all stakeholders. Provide weekly status, steering committee and governance reports including scope, schedule, budget, resources, risks/issues, mitigation and internal/external dependencies.
project_management_responsibilities.governance_management: Define and document a governance model that covers all stakeholders across governance, steering, program and project levels. Define and document stakeholder management plan targeting each stakeholder's interests. Manage stakeholder and sponsor support within the program objectives.
project_management_responsibilities.closure_management: Define criteria for project closure. Obtain handover signoff from stakeholders and operations management. Create full financial report and reconciliation at the time of project closure and handover.

constraints.location: United States and Japan (open to remote and hybrid)
constraints.availability: Open to full-time, consulting, or advisory AI/IT delivery roles
